3. 两院已通过，无明显争议

agent_trace.summary: ICS日历文件已创建，验证文件存在性
agent_trace.raw_tail:
天后
days_until_tuesday = (1 - current_date.weekday() + 7) % 7  # 0=Monday, 1=Tuesday
if days_until_tuesday == 0:
    days_until_tuesday = 7  # 如果今天是周二，下周二是7天后
next_tuesday = current_date + timedelta(days=days_until_tuesday)
print(f"Next Tuesday: {next_tuesday.strftime('%Y-%m-%d (%A)')}")

# ICS 时间：15:00
dt_start = next_tuesday.replace(hour=15, minute=0, second=0)
dt_end = dt_start + timedelta(hours=1)  # 默认1小时

# 生成 ICS 文件内容
ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//Task//Calendar//EN
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:project-sync-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}@task
DTSTAMP:{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}
DTSTART:{dt_start.strftime('%Y%m%dT150000')}
DTEND:{dt_end.strftime('%Y%m%dT160000')}
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# 写入文件
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/us_federal/20260325T115201Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
filepath = f"{workspace}/project_sync.ics"

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(ics_content)

print(f"\nICS file created: {filepath}")
print("\n=== ICS Content ===")
print(ics_content)

meta.raw_tail:
天后
days_until_tuesday = (1 - current_date.weekday() + 7) % 7  # 0=Monday, 1=Tuesday
if days_until_tuesday == 0:
    days_until_tuesday = 7  # 如果今天是周二，下周二是7天后
next_tuesday = current_date + timedelta(days=days_until_tuesday)
print(f"Next Tuesday: {next_tuesday.strftime('%Y-%m-%d (%A)')}")

# ICS 时间：15:00
dt_start = next_tuesday.replace(hour=15, minute=0, second=0)
dt_end = dt_start + timedelta(hours=1)  # 默认1小时

# 生成 ICS 文件内容
ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//Task//Calendar//EN
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:project-sync-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}@task
DTSTAMP:{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}
DTSTART:{dt_start.strftime('%Y%m%dT150000')}
DTEND:{dt_end.strftime('%Y%m%dT160000')}
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# 写入文件
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/us_federal/20260325T115201Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
filepath = f"{workspace}/project_sync.ics"

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(ics_content)

print(f"\nICS file created: {filepath}")
print("\n=== ICS Content ===")
print(ics_content)
